title: BfArM Arzneimittel-Referenzdaten
description: Referenzdaten des Bundesinstituts für Arzneimittel und Medizinprodukte (BfArM) – Arzneimittel, pharmazeutische Produkte und Wirkstoffe.

medicinal_product.title: Arzneimittel (Medicinal Products)
medicinal_product.description: Referenzdaten zugelassener Arzneimittel mit PZN, Darreichungsform und Bezeichnung.

substance.title: Wirkstoffe (Substances)
substance.description: Wirkstoffe und deren Stärke je pharmazeutischem Produkt.

suche_arzneimittel.title: 🔍 Arzneimittel suchen
suche_arzneimittel.sql: SELECT rmp_key, rmp_pzn, rmp_mpd_name, rmp_pfm_name, rmp_pfm_put_long FROM medicinal_product WHERE rmp_mpd_name LIKE '%' || :suchbegriff || '%' ORDER BY rmp_mpd_name LIMIT 100

suche_wirkstoff.title: 🧪 Wirkstoff suchen
suche_wirkstoff.description: Alle Arzneimittel mit einem bestimmten Wirkstoff
suche_wirkstoff.sql: SELECT mp.rmp_pzn, mp.rmp_mpd_name, s.rse_substance_name, s.rse_substance_strength, mp.rmp_pfm_put_long FROM substance s JOIN pharmaceutical_product pp ON s.rpp_key = pp.rpp_key JOIN medicinal_product mp ON pp.rmp_key = mp.rmp_key WHERE s.rse_substance_name LIKE '%' || :wirkstoff || '%' ORDER BY s.rse_substance_name, mp.rmp_mpd_name LIMIT 200

suche_pzn.title: 📦 PZN nachschlagen
suche_pzn.sql: SELECT mp.rmp_pzn, mp.rmp_mpd_name, mp.rmp_pfm_put_long, pp.rpp_description, s.rse_substance_name, s.rse_substance_strength FROM medicinal_product mp LEFT JOIN pharmaceutical_product pp ON mp.rmp_key = pp.rmp_key LEFT JOIN substance s ON pp.rpp_key = s.rpp_key WHERE mp.rmp_pzn = :pzn ORDER BY s.rse_substance_rank

darreichungsformen.title: 💊 Darreichungsformen (Top 50)
darreichungsformen.sql: SELECT rmp_pfm_put_long AS darreichungsform, rmp_pfm_name AS name, COUNT(*) AS anzahl FROM medicinal_product GROUP BY rmp_pfm_put_long, rmp_pfm_name ORDER BY anzahl DESC LIMIT 50

wirkstoffe_ranking.title: 🏆 Häufigste Wirkstoffe
wirkstoffe_ranking.description: Top 100 Wirkstoffe nach Anzahl der Arzneimittel
wirkstoffe_ranking.sql: SELECT rse_substance_name AS wirkstoff, rse_substance_id AS id, COUNT(DISTINCT rpp_key) AS anzahl_produkte FROM substance GROUP BY rse_substance_name, rse_substance_id ORDER BY anzahl_produkte DESC LIMIT 100

datenstand.title: 📋 Datenstand
datenstand.sql: SELECT key AS eigenschaft, value AS wert FROM _import_meta UNION ALL SELECT 'Arzneimittel', CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT) FROM medicinal_product UNION ALL SELECT 'Pharma-Produkte', CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT) FROM pharmaceutical_product UNION ALL SELECT 'Wirkstoffe', CAST(COUNT(*) AS TEXT) FROM substance
